_README: MmapGen per-map / per-tile generator config. Top-level keys are stringified map IDs; values for that map are flat scalars (agentRadius, agentHeight, walkableRadius, walkableHeight, walkableSlopeAngle, etc.). Per-tile overrides go in nested objects under the map (the inner key is `tileX || tileY`, no separator). The `default` block at the top is read by tools/NavDataAudit only -- MmapGen itself ignores it. See docs/physics/MMAP_FORMAT.md.
_agentNotes: Tauren Male is the largest WoW capsule (radius 1.0247, height 2.625). All continent maps must be generated for that capsule. agentRadius / agentHeight are in WoW meters. walkableRadius/walkableHeight/walkableClimb were previously specified as integer cell counts tied to ch=0.25 / cs=0.2666 — that's a footgun when ch or cs change (PFS-OVERHAUL-006: setting them to 0 lets TileWorker auto-derive cell counts from agentRadius/agentHeight/agentMaxClimbModelTerrainTransition divided by cs/ch, producing correct world-unit erosion / clearance / climb regardless of cell size).

1._2940_README: Per-tile override for tile (X=29, Y=40) — OG zeppelin tower. cs=0.1m (vs 0.2666m default) for fine horizontal resolution on thin overhanging structures (the deck edge wall). At cs=0.2666 the deck triangle's XY footprint doesn't fill the bot's voxel column, so rcFilterWalkableLowHeightSpans never sees the deck overhead and fails to mark under-deck cells as low-clearance. Tile size grows substantially with cs=0.1, but only for this one tile. PFS-OVERHAUL-006.
